text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Tokai Teio announces that she will compete
in the Japan Cup, Satono Diamond also decides
to enter.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I never thought you'd enter this race as well, Dia.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Why wouldn't I? Teio is one of the runners I hope
to surpass!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
She's McQueen's special rival. It's only natural
that I'd want to challenge her too!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I guess you've got a point! We both came
here to see how strong Teio is, after all!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: There's also something I'd like to learn from her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to witness how she fulfills her role as an
illustrious runner.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I don't really get it, but I guess you've got
your reasons.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But Teio's someone that I've always looked up to!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm not letting you claim this victory! I'm going to
be the one to beat her!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm going to beat both of you and achieve
my goal of becoming an illustrious runner!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You two may have gotten a lot stronger, but
you've got a long way to go before you can beat
me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You'll be cowering with your tails between your
legs once you witness my true power!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Kita! Dia! Come at me with all you've got!
